query:
insert into TracedCodeBlocks (
                            last_collect_nr,
                            file_hash,
                            traced_line,
                            start_line,
                            end_line,
                            kind,
                            content_hash
                        )
                        values (
                            $1,
                            $2,
                            $3,
                            $4,
                            $5,
                            $6,
                            $7
                        )
                        on conflict (file_hash, traced_line)
                        do update set
                            last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                            start_line = excluded.start_line,
                            end_line = excluded.end_line,
                            kind = excluded.kind,
                            content_hash = excluded.content_hash
